---
title: "Home"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

Welcome to my research website. This is where my R code will be

### IFNy RNA Sequencing Analysis Pipeline
[RNA Sequencing Quality Check](https://hatamtam.github.io/IFNy/IFNy_RNASeq_Quality_Check.html)

[Differentially Expressed Gene Analysis](https://hatamtam.github.io/IFNy/IFNy_DEG_Analysis.html)
